title: 4PCS Bow Wide Headbands for Women, Bow Elastic Headbands for Women, Knotted Headband, Head Bands for Women's Hair Non Slip(Gray, Black, Brown, White)
features: Premium Material: Our bow thick non-slip headbands for women are made from high-quality polyester fabric that's soft, lightweight, breathable, and highly stretchable. They offer long-lasting comfort without pulling on hair or causing discomfort. Durable and durable, they ensure all-day wear.

Two Wearing Methods: These Bow non-slip headbands for women offer two stylish ways to wear them: wear the bow in front for a cute, preppy look; flip the bow to the back for a sleek, sporty, and minimalist look. One accessory, two unique styles to express your personality.

Sizing Details: Each bow thick headband measures 25.6x13.4cm/10.08x5.28inches. The perfect size and elasticity allow them to comfortably fit most head sizes. They're designed to provide a secure yet smooth hold for all-day comfort during various activities.

Package Included: You'll receive a set of four elegant bow thick non-slip headbands for women in four versatile colors: gray, black, brown, and white. Perfectly complementing any outfit and mood, these cute bow headbands offer a versatile and comfortable experience. They're the perfect addition to your stylish hair accessory collection.

Multiple-use: Whether you're at the gym, running errands, at the office, or just relaxing at home, these cute bow headbands for women are the perfect companion. They effectively prevent hair from obscuring your face during exercise while adding a stylish touch to your everyday outfits, perfect for every aspect of your life.
